items.name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, complete packaging
❤️mini size
This DioGroove 20 handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from black calfskin with a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dio's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key charm features the Christian DioParis logo and is accented with gold-finished stars, unique and distinctive. The key charm opens the zip lock. The spacious compartment features a slip pocket and a zip pocket for daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for daily looks.
Model:8808
Dimensions:16.5 x 10x 8cm (L x H x W)

items.name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, complete packaging
Dior D-LITE Handbag
 ✨ Heart Qixi Five-Grid Embroidery ✨
 This Lady D-Lite handbag blends classic elegance with a fashionable look. Adorned with Pietro Ruffo designed patterns throughout, highlighting the classic butterfly beauty of the series, accented with the text 'L'envol des papillons dévoile nos désirs aux étoiles'. The front features the Christian Dior Paris logo, paired with a light gold-finished metal D.I.O.R. charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Medium size, with a detachable embroidered wide shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody.
Model: D6814, Dimensions: 24 x 20 x 11cm
